---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or use case.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

**Roadmap alignment**
Does this relate to any phase in the [Roadmap](../../ROADMAP.md)? (v2 Streaming, v3 Security, etc.)

**Would you like to implement this?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
